name: Verify authorized customer record can be edited, saved as draft and displayed in draft queue

steps.name: Click locator('//div[@class=\'mb-1\' and contains(.,\'Country Of Birth\')]//following-sibling::div')

Click locator('body > div:nth-child(1) > section:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(1) > section:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > form:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1)')
Fill "17th Cross, MG Road" getByPlaceholder('Enter Street and Road')
Fill "BrownStone Appartment, Flat 101" getByPlaceholder('Enter Flat And Building')
Click locator('//div[@class=\'mb-1\' and contains(.,\'AML Customer Risk Rating\')]//following-sibling::div')
Click getByText('Select Date Of Birth', { exact: true })
Click getByText('Select KYC Declaration Date', { exact: true })
Click locator('//div[@class=\'mb-1\' and contains(.,\'TDS Reason Code\')]//following-sibling::div')
Click getByLabel('Choose Wednesday, June 16th, 2021', { exact: true })
Click getByText('Select Registration Type', { exact: true })
Click getByText('Select Registration Date', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Query count locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('p').filter({ hasText: 'Are you sure you want to close?' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Are you sure, you want to Submit', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'ASSIGN' })
Query count locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'REFIND202606000328' }).first().getByRole('button', { name: 'AUTHORIZE' })
